notes: v2.5.11 — required update. Everyone needs to update to keep using AOS. The Knowledge Base now has proper security levels (General through Critical): each person has a clearance, sections protect the pages inside them, and the more sensitive pages go through an approve/reject review before they publish. Everyone starts at General, so nothing you use today disappears. Client POs now have a real home in AOS — a tab on every project with full version and decision history, a review inbox, a searchable ledger of every PO on record, and documents that actually open (the viewer now fills the panel instead of a one-inch sliver). Quote documents open again too. The Proc / Mat / Spec editor is back to its full three-tab layout with duplicate-material protection and a warning before you change something already in use, and picking a Proc / Mat / Spec on an eBOM is now one forgiving search box instead of two steps. CAPAs can be handed to QC with a new Awaiting QC Close step; people who have left the company are no longer offered when you assign work; free-text Location is back for inventory admins; Planner row buttons and board titles no longer get cut off; and the CATIA remote view is far steadier, with mouse and keyboard behaving the way they do in CATIA. This release also updates the database behind AOS, so older versions will not work correctly against it — please update as soon as you are prompted.
